text:
2 projects are already more than two weeks behind, and 5 are spending ahead of delivery progress.

3 projects also carry two or more critical blockers, which means the schedule risk is likely to stay elevated unless escalation gets faster.

Resource utilization above 90% and neutral or negative stakeholder sentiment show that the pressure is visible both inside the delivery teams and with client-facing sponsors.
